calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew H. Dai for petitioner Hai Yan Qiu (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Spousal Property.

The Court inquired why the petition should not be taken off calendar. Mr. Dai apologized for delay and stated he had been in trial in Sacramento County for several months and had inadvertently failed to address the examiners notes.

The Court noted that the matter had been outstanding for several months and ordered the petition off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Appearances: Andrew Dai appeared via zoom for Hai Yan Qiu ( Petitioner).

Mr. Dai requested a short continuance to address the examiners notes. The matter is continued to August 26, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
